name: TestCheckCondition
title: TestCheckCondition
description: Checks whether the specified condition was already injured.
This function can be used both within a test case and also on test module level.

parameters.name: aAuxHandle
parameters.description: Event object, for example a check from the TestService Library. Specified is the handle that is returned on creation of a check. This function can be used both within a test case and also on the test module level.

return: 1: Condition was already injured at least once
